_comment: FRESHNESS transition-debt only (see .claude/rules/testing.md). Existence is mandatory and NOT grandfathered — every component must have a test. Names here are components changed-without-test-touch before the gate existed; they are exempt from the freshness check only. New freshness debt is blocked. Re-snapshot with TEST_GATE_BASE=<base> pnpm --filter @aziontech/webkit run test:gate:update.
